suite.name: DP_AutoTest
suite.source: D:\WorkCode\DP\DP_AutoTest\IPTV_HENANYD_72\测试用例\功能测试\01_首页模板功能\测试.robot

kw.name: 启动应用
kw.doc: 盒端启用应用程序

kw.name: Register Keyword To Run On Failure
kw.doc: Sets the keyword to execute when a AppiumLibrary keyword fails.
kw.msg: Nothing will be run on failure.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: 解除网络限速
kw.doc: 网络限速配置

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.arg: tc qdisc del dev eth0 root;tc class del dev eth0 root
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.
kw.msg: ${adb_net_command1} = tc qdisc del dev eth0 root;tc class del dev eth0 root

kw.name: Adb Shell Command
kw.msg: RTNETLINK answers: No such file or directory RTNETLINK answers: No such file or directory
${info1} = (b'', b'RTNETLINK answers: No such file or directory\r\nRTNETLINK answers: No such file or directory\r\n')

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: 清除历史上报数据
kw.doc: 清除历史上报的数据

kw.name: 清除设备缓存
kw.doc: 清除设备缓存

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Press Keycode
kw.doc: Sends a press of keycode to the device.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Open Application
kw.doc: Opens a new application to given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://github.com/appium/appium/blob/master/docs/en/writing-running-appium/server-args.md | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | no | alias | | strict_ssl | No | allows you to send commands to an invalid certificate host like a self-signed one. |

test.name: case_005 新直播居中模板页面检查
test.doc: 首页通栏模板-新直播居中模板 common_live_mid2_template
